title: Epistles
author: Horace
description: The Epistles of Horace from The Works of Horace and translated Literally into English Prose by C. Smart, A.M. The Complete 2 Books. The Epistles (or Letters) of Horace were published in two books, in 20 BCE and 14 BCE, respectively. Epistularum liber primus (First Book of Letters) is the seventh work by Horace, published in the year 20 BCE. This book consists of 20 Epistles. The phrase sapere aude ("dare to be wise") comes from this collection of poems. Epistularum liber secundus (Second Book of...
